transcript: Can you survive the Mickey Mouse Challenge? Wait until midnight. Play this 1928 clip of Steamboat Willie and do the same whistle. Wait, and you'll be visited by Mickey. it's midnight i'm about to do the mickey mouse challenge. Hopefully Mickey won't come and get me.  I don't know. 1.5 tsk vanilleekstrakt It's late you're tired just do your dishes Субтитры сделал DimaTorzok Thank you. Редактор субтитров А.Семкин Корректор А.Егорова
